---
title: "Reproducible GLMM Workflow for Longitudinal Behavioral Data"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-26"
---
# Setup
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

set.seed(123)
```

## Overview

This project demonstrates a reproducible workflow for analyzing longitudinal behavioral and signaling data using generalized linear mixed models (GLMMs) in R. The workflow includes data cleaning, exploratory visualization, model fitting, diagnostics, and effect visualization.

The example analysis evaluates relationships among behavioral outcomes, social rank, and quantitative signaling metrics across repeated observations of individuals through time.

# Packages
```{r packages}
if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")

pacman::p_load(tidyverse, glmmTMB, DHARMa, 
               ggeffects, patchwork, here
               )
```
